code: import React from'react';import'./style.css';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const Hooks=()=>{const getData=()=>({count1:1,count2:2});const[state,setState]=React.useState(getData());const handleIncrement=()=>{setState(prevState=>({...prevState,count1:prevState.count1+1}));};const handleDecrement=()=>{setState(prevState=>({...prevState,count2:prevState.count2-1}));};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("main",{className:"hooks-page",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("section",{className:"hooks-card",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"hooks-kicker",children:"React Hooks"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{children:"Object State Example"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{className:"hooks-text",children:["This example shows how to update separate values inside one state object using",/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("code",{children:" useState"}),"."]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"hooks-grid",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"hooks-counter-box",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"hooks-label",children:"Count 1"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("strong",{children:state.count1}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{type:"button",className:"hooks-button primary",onClick:handleIncrement,children:"Increase Count 1"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"hooks-counter-box",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"hooks-label",children:"Count 2"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("strong",{children:state.count2}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{type:"button",className:"hooks-button secondary",onClick:handleDecrement,children:"Decrease Count 2"})]})]})]})});};export default Hooks;
